case_title: BOYKO, VICTORIA VS VERTIGO STORE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $172.50 FILED BY BOYKO, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT VERTIGO STORE PAOW, MICHELLE IND & DBA SUNSHINE CLEANERS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERTIGO STORE PAOW, MICHELLE IND & DBA SUNSHINE CLEANERS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOYKO, VICTORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERTIGO STORE PAOW, MICHELLE IND & DBA SUNSHINE CLEANERS. $172.50 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.50, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, MICHELLE PAOW, IND/DBA SUNSHINE CLEANERS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
